prefs.autostartSub: Launch in the background (tray) at sign-in
prefs.startMinSub: On autostart, open straight to the tray without a window
prefs.telemetrySub: Helps find and fix bugs. Off by default; nothing is sent yet.
prefs.gameModeSub: Do not change theme and wallpapers during games or full-screen applications
prefs.welcomeSub: Show the first-run welcome screen again
prefs.aboutSub: Auto-switches wallpaper when the Windows theme changes

welcome.title: Welcome to Lumina
welcome.sub: Lumina keeps separate wallpapers for the light and dark theme — per monitor — and switches them automatically when the Windows theme changes. It runs in the background, in the system tray.
welcome.autoSub: Change wallpaper when the Windows theme changes
welcome.startupSub: Launch in the background (tray) at sign-in
welcome.themeSub: Let Lumina change the theme on a schedule. More options in Appearance.
welcome.trayNote: You can close the window — the app keeps running in the tray. No need to run the installer again.

home.trayNote: The app keeps running in the system tray after the window is closed.

design.monitorNote: Pick a monitor — the wallpapers below apply to it. Each monitor has its own day/night pair.
design.autoSwitchSub: Change the wallpaper automatically when Windows switches between light and dark mode
design.styleSub: How the image fits the desktop
design.singleSub: Use a single image across every monitor

library.empty: Your library is empty — drop images here or click “Add”.

online.hint: Type tags and hit Search to browse online wallpapers.

theme.modeSub: Lumina will turn light/dark mode on at the chosen times
theme.autoCoordsSub: Automatically set coordinates based on your location

slideshow.title: Slideshow
slideshow.sub: Cycle the wallpaper through your added photos and folders
slideshow.orderSub: How the next picture is chosen

toast.noWallpaperTheme: No wallpaper set for the current theme
toast.updateManual: Find updates on the Releases page
toast.shortcutInvalid: Global shortcut must contain at least one modifier (Ctrl, Alt, Win) or function key (F1-F24)

shortcuts.nextSub: Switch to the next wallpaper on all monitors via global hotkey

triggers.startupSub: Switch wallpapers on every system boot
triggers.wakeupSub: Switch wallpapers when the computer wakes from sleep
triggers.stealthSub: Wait up to 2 minutes for a full-screen window to switch wallpapers invisibly
triggers.stealthTooltip: Lumina will wait until you open a full-screen window on the monitor before changing its wallpaper, making the transition invisible to you.

smart.updateText: A new version of Lumina is downloaded and ready to install. Restart the app to apply the update.
tips: Did you know Lumina can hide? Enable Stealth Mode in settings, and the wallpaper will only change when your entire screen is covered by a window.
In Appearance, you can drag and drop images or whole folders directly onto the monitor cards.
Enable Game Mode in settings so Lumina pauses wallpaper changes and slideshows while you are playing.
Each monitor can have its own day/night wallpaper pair and its own slideshow. Or you can turn on 'One wallpaper for all monitors'.
Assign a folder in the Library. If you add new photos to that folder, your slideshow will update automatically.
Set the theme schedule to 'By sun', and Lumina will switch the light and dark themes exactly at sunrise and sunset.
